ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quantities" (
  "quantity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantity type */,
  "quantity_type" TEXT /* Description of the quantity type (e.g., Quantity Released) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units used to measure the quantity (e.g., Pounds) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the quantity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility submitting the report */,
  "report_year" TEXT /* Year of the report (e.g., 2023) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Submitted, Approved) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Environmental Officer, Compliance Manager, Admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_facility_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date the access was granted */,
  "revoked_date" TEXT /* Date the access was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_facility_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report to which the comment belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "response_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment this comment is responding to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report to which the attachment belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_attachments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_regulations" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the substance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the substance */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the substance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_substances" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance */,
  "quantity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quantity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "substance_id", "quantity_id")
)
